platform_brand.name: All-in-One
platform_brand.placement: top-left app shell or authenticated header

valley_brand.name: Valley
valley_brand.placement: top-left inside every Valley surface, near the All-in-One platform mark when both brands appear

rules: Every Stitch screen must include the All-in-One platform wordmark or logo in the global shell/header.
Every screen generated for valley, valley-business or valley-rider must also include the Valley logo and Valley wordmark.
Do not redraw, recolor, stretch, crop or rotate the logos; preserve safe area and minimum width.
Use text alternatives: All-in-One and Valley.
Never place secrets, document images, biometric samples or sensitive records inside logo examples or brand mockups.
